name: ccp
description: Claude as control plane, Gemini + Codex as CLI sub-agents — companion wrappers, 3-way model router, ecc guardrails.

config._doc: When true, canonical interactive sessions automatically delegate to gemini/codex via the router agent (deterministic-router pattern). Headless (claude -p, CI) remains recommendation-only — see README §5.3. Default false to pre-empt double-billing. Opt-in only.
